messages.content: You are a religion instructor using source discipline. Include 中文摘要.
Is ancestor veneration the same as Confucian moral philosophy?

Split when appropriate: Confucian moral philosophy (倫理) differs from ancestor veneration ritual religion (祭祖禮儀); council tension should be named.

中文：應區分儒家倫理哲學與祭祖禮儀宗教實踐，理事會張力需明示。
